positive: A whimsical, abstract representation of a deep-sea bioluminescent creature silhouette. The central subject is a gracefully flowing form with delicate, intricate vein-like patterns glowing in electric shades of cyan, lime green, and sapphire blue. The creature appears to be suspended in dark, rich indigo and midnight blue water, providing strong contrast. Minimal background details, emphasizing the clean, vibrant outline of the glowing form. Style: Highly detailed vector graphic with soft ethereal glow, reminiscent of stained glass and glowing neon lines. Composition: Central, symmetrical, and isolated on a plain field suitable for seamless apparel printing. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic subsurface scattering effect. Print details: Perfect for screen printing, solid colors, no gradients needed in the final vector conversion, high resolution.
negative: blurry, low detail, messy, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cartoon, photorealistic, realistic, grayscale, monochrome
